title: Bok Choy Baiser
description: A buttery and velvety Russian dish featuring roasted bok choy that's perfect for a show-off dinner entree.

ingredients.name: 1 head of bok choy
ingredients.notes: Trim the stem and keep it for later use

instructions: Trim the bok choy, leaving about an inch of stem.
Cut the bok choy into small bite-sized pieces and place in a mixing bowl with half of the grated parmesan cheese.
Add in the butter and toss to coat evenly. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Spread the bok choy mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving some space between each piece.
Roast for 15 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Meanwhile, mix together the remaining parmesan cheese with the heavy cream in another bowl. Remove from oven and drizzle the cheese sauce over the roasted bok choy pieces.
Return to oven and continue roasting for an additional 10-12 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly on top.
Garnish with fresh herbs if desired before serving.
